purpose: Stateless input validation for TravelInput. Returns a TravelOutput with status=SUCCESS on valid input, or status=FAILED with a specific ErrorCode and human-readable error_message on any validation failure. Called as the first step of every API request before routing_engine.plan().

fields_validated.rule: non-empty string, must exist in KNOWN_CITIES set (case-insensitive)
non-empty list; each stop.city must be in KNOWN_CITIES; lat/lng in range; arrival_date <= departure_date
must be a Preference enum member
each element must be a TransportMode enum member
must be a Currency enum member

failure_case.error_code: ErrorCode value matching the first failing field
